examples.name: any_over_limit
examples.py:
def any_over_limit(spec: dict) -> bool:
    """Return True if any node reachable from start has a reading above limit."""
    adj = spec["adj"]; vals = spec["vals"]; start = spec["start"]; limit = spec["limit"]
    seen = set(); stack = [start]
    while stack:
        n = stack.pop()
        if n in seen: continue
        seen.add(n)
        if vals[n] > limit: return True
        stack.extend(adj.get(n, []))
    return False

examples.name: all_flags_set
examples.py:
def all_flags_set(spec: dict) -> bool:
    """Return True if every node reachable from start has its flag turned on."""
    adj = spec["adj"]; flags = spec["flags"]; start = spec["start"]
    seen = set(); stack = [start]
    while stack:
        n = stack.pop()
        if n in seen: continue
        seen.add(n)
        if not flags[n]: return False
        stack.extend(adj.get(n, []))
    return True

examples.name: count_label_matches
examples.py:
def count_label_matches(spec: dict) -> int:
    """Count nodes reachable from start whose label equals the target label."""
    adj = spec["adj"]; labels = spec["labels"]; start = spec["start"]; target = spec["target"]
    seen = set(); stack = [start]; hits = 0
    while stack:
        n = stack.pop()
        if n in seen: continue
        seen.add(n)
        if labels[n] == target: hits += 1
        stack.extend(adj.get(n, []))
    return hits

examples.name: min_over_positive
examples.py:
def min_over_positive(spec: dict) -> int:
    """Return the smallest positive value among reachable nodes, or -1 if none."""
    adj = spec["adj"]; vals = spec["vals"]; start = spec["start"]
    seen = set(); stack = [start]; best = -1
    while stack:
        n = stack.pop()
        if n in seen: continue
        seen.add(n); v = vals[n]
        if v > 0 and (best == -1 or v < best): best = v
        stack.extend(adj.get(n, []))
    return best

examples.name: sign_bucket_counts
examples.py:
def sign_bucket_counts(spec: dict) -> dict:
    """Bucket reachable nodes by the sign of their value and count each bucket."""
    adj = spec["adj"]; vals = spec["vals"]; start = spec["start"]
    seen = set(); stack = [start]
    buckets = {"neg": 0, "zero": 0, "pos": 0}
    while stack:
        n = stack.pop()
        if n in seen: continue
        seen.add(n); v = vals[n]
        if v < 0: buckets["neg"] += 1
        elif v == 0: buckets["zero"] += 1
        else: buckets["pos"] += 1
        stack.extend(adj.get(n, []))
    return buckets

examples.name: label_histogram
avg_over_threshold
examples.py:
def avg_over_threshold(spec: dict) -> float:
    """Return the mean of reachable values strictly above cutoff, or 0.0 if none."""
    adj = spec["adj"]; vals = spec["vals"]; start = spec["start"]; cutoff = spec["cutoff"]
    seen = set(); stack = [start]; total = 0; cnt = 0
    while stack:
        n = stack.pop()
        if n in seen: continue
        seen.add(n); v = vals[n]
        if v > cutoff:
            total += v; cnt += 1
        stack.extend(adj.get(n, []))
    if cnt == 0: return 0.0
    return total / cnt

examples.name: names_passing
count_even_leaves
examples.py:
def count_even_leaves(spec: dict) -> int:
    """Count reachable nodes that are leaves (no children) with an even value."""
    adj = spec["adj"]; vals = spec["vals"]; start = spec["start"]
    seen = set(); stack = [start]; hits = 0
    while stack:
        n = stack.pop()
        if n in seen: continue
        seen.add(n); kids = adj.get(n, [])
        if len(kids) == 0 and vals[n] % 2 == 0: hits += 1
        stack.extend(kids)
    return hits

examples.name: max_under_cap
examples.py:
def max_under_cap(spec: dict) -> int:
    """Return the largest reachable value strictly below cap, or -1 if none."""
    adj = spec["adj"]; vals = spec["vals"]; start = spec["start"]; cap = spec["cap"]
    seen = set(); stack = [start]; best = -1
    while stack:
        n = stack.pop()
        if n in seen: continue
        seen.add(n); v = vals[n]
        if v < cap and v > best: best = v
        stack.extend(adj.get(n, []))
    return best

examples.name: gated_count
sum_unblocked
examples.py:
def sum_unblocked(spec: dict) -> int:
    """Sum values along paths from start, pruning any blocked node and its subtree."""
    adj = spec["adj"]; vals = spec["vals"]; blocked = spec["blocked"]; start = spec["start"]
    seen = set(); stack = [start]; total = 0
    while stack:
        n = stack.pop()
        if n in seen: continue
        seen.add(n)
        if blocked[n]: continue
        total += vals[n]
        stack.extend(adj.get(n, []))
    return total
